title: BIOCAPTUR S50 - Application technique
subtitle: BIOCAPTUR S50 -Technique d' application
description: A guide describing the application technique of the BIOCAPTUR S50, a high-tech LED-based suction trap for ecological control of pests such as Tuta absoluta in intensive vegetable production. It outlines the device’s features, including its 360-degree rotation system and adjustable suction airflow, and provides operation guidelines for open field and greenhouse use.
